document.name: Flushing YMCA — Traditional Summer Camp (2026)
document.shortDescription: Flushing Y day camp (2026): Traditional, Kinder, Swim, and Teen tracks in two-week sessions with instructional swim and published member/community rates.
document.longDescription:
The Flushing YMCA of Greater New York runs 2026 Summer Day Camp at 138-46 Northern Boulevard. Published camp hours are 9 a.m.–5 p.m. with optional extended hours 8–9 a.m. and 5–6 p.m. Summer camp is scheduled to start June 29, 2026, and run in two-week sessions through August 21, 2026, with closure Friday, July 3, for the Independence Day holiday.

Program tracks on the official camp page include Traditional Summer Camp (ages 6–11), Kinder Camp for children entering kindergarten in September 2026 (ages 4–5), Swim Camp (ages 7–11), and Teen Camp (ages 12–15). The Traditional camp description highlights sports, arts and crafts, science, theme days, group play, team building, and instructional swim.

Published per-session tuition on the same page: Traditional Summer Camp—Y member $685, community $771; Kinder Camp—member $771, community $856; Swim Camp—member $799, community $885; Teen Camp—member $685, community $771 (each per two-week session). Open house dates including April 4, April 18, and April 24 are listed. Camp leadership contact: Amanda Algu, FlDayCamp@ymcanyc.org, 718-551-9375. Branch phone: 718-551-9350.

Sources: https://ymcanyc.org/locations/flushing-ymca/programs-classes/camps https://ymcanyc.org/locations/flushing-ymca
document.announcementDescription: Flushing Y lists 10% early-bird savings when the full balance is paid by April 18, 2026, plus sibling discounts—see branch camp page.
